contextual_human_review_policy.red_rule: EDENA Red is ineligible until a separate governance route permits a clean eligible artifact; an absolute stop is never waivable.

domains.name: respiratory-care professional development, SCOPE/CIRCLE/ORBIT stewardship and whole-life sustainability

criteria.description: A nurse-authored low-risk objective has outcome, process, balancing, burden and independence measures.
At least two frozen agents, or one agent plus an independent reviewer, operate only at P1–P2.
Context, data, tools, time, cost, token, retry, destination, expiry and human gates are frozen before the run.
Unauthorized handoff, recursion, permission widening and background continuation are rejected.
The Respiratory Care Professional demonstrates cancellation or a safe fictional failure-and-recovery path without false completion.
Consequential claims receive independent source and named-human review with conflicts and unknowns retained.
Evaluate records benefit, burden, accessibility, independence, unintended effects and the next-cycle decision.
A complete receipt distinguishes Respiratory Care Professional work, agent work, human decisions, corrections, disclosures and exclusions.
A scope-matched human reviews process quality without asserting clinical competence, licensure, certification, privileges or authority.

legacy_identity.notice: The four-level system, CAP IDs, criteria and badge records are build-layer additions.

noncredential_notice: Developmental evidence only; not continuing-education credit, licensure, certification, clinical competence, scope, privilege, prescribing authority, payer enrollment, employment validation, research determination, institutional approval or authorization to practice.
